name: reading-partner
description: On Linux, a separate Chrome instance with webgpu can be started with: ```bash google-chrome --enable-unsafe-webgpu --ozone-platform=x11 --use-angle=vulkan --enable-features=Vulkan,VulkanFromANGLE --user-data-dir=/tmp/chrome-webgpu ```

scripts.build:app: cross-env VITE_BASE_PATH=./ VITE_TARGET=app npm run build
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:app && cap sync android
